case_title: KWIKCASH, INC. VS. JOSEPH P GORDON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KWIKCASH, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, JOSEPH P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $70.00) SERVED APR-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, JOSEPH P
(SC-150) REQUEST FOR RESET FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-15-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-16-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT GORDON, JOSEPH P

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GORDON, JOSEPH P $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. KWIKCASE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER LEGAL EXCUETIVE OFFICER. DEFENDANT JOSEPH P. GORDON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
